RULING:
PLAINTIFF EDWARD REIDY AS TRUSTEE OF THE OLGA EUGENIA LINDEMOOD TESTAMENTARY TRUST'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Order signed (301/JWL/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Appearances:
James Kraus, Esq. for Plaintiff Edward Reidy as trustee of the Olga Eugenia Lindemood testamentary trust, also present, was sworn & examined.
Defendant did not appear.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Cian Munar, for Declaratory Judgment against the defendant to show plaintiff has complied with the Ellis Act of the property located at 2820 Scott St., San Francisco. See the Judgment for specific terms.

Plaintiff's counsel is to dismiss Defendant Munar on the Amended Complaint.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Continued To Nov-06-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Continued To Oct-23-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: Janet Pond
Appearances:
James Brandan Kraus, Esq. for Plaintiff Edward Reidy as trustee of the Olga Eugenia Lindemood Testamentary Trust appeared.
After hearing the evidence presented, the matter is continued to Oct. 23, 2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218. Plaintiff's counsel to submit a summary and statement of facts with a courtesy copy to Dept. 218 no later than Oct. 20, 2003. Plaintiff's two witnesses, Mr. Ledbetter and Mr. Reidy are to appear at the Oct. 23, 2003 hearing. The court further advises counsel to submit packet prior to the hearing in the future and to produce live witnesses at hearings in the future.

If the Oct. 23, 2003 hearing date is not workable for the two witnesses, counsel may arrange a hearing date on any Tuesday or Thursday at 9:00 am with the court clerk.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Denied. Plaintiff Edward Reidy's motion for summary judgment -- failure to dispose of a complete cause of action; failure to shift burden. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(301/JLW/BH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
